headline: Analysts Estimate Otis Worldwide (OTIS) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
